title: Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam
tagline: Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kodandaramaswamy Temple or Pattabi Rama Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Salem district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kodandaramaswamy Temple or Pattabi Rama Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Salem district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is glorified by Valmiki, Vasishta, Bharadvaja and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition. This temple is called as the Dakshina Ayodhya (Ayodhya of South India). The temple is constructed in the South Indian style of architecture, dedicated to the god Rama, the seventh avatar of Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Mookaneri Lake
topPlaces.description: Mookaneri Lake, also called Kannankurichi Lake, is a lake in Kannankurichi, in the Salem Taluk of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, that covers an area of 23.5 hectares (58 acres). It is located to the south of the Shevaroy Hills and is a major body of water in Salem.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (113 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam?
faq.a: Stays in Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kodandaramaswamy Temple, Ayodhyapatinam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ayothiapattinam, Masinaickenpatti, Minnampalli, Karipatti, Ammapet.
